name: Content Updates
description: Frequency and quality of content updates and new features.
sources: App Store descriptions, App release notes, Official app blogs, Social media channels, community forums, developer blogs

name: In-App Purchases
description: The availability and variety of in-app purchases.
sources: Amazon Appstore, App Annie, Apple App Store, Google Play Store, Sensor Tower

name: Multiplayer Features
description: The availability and quality of multiplayer modes.

name: Number of Downloads
description: The total number of times the app has been downloaded.
sources: Amazon Appstore, Apple App Store, Google Play Store, Sensor Tower

name: Regular Updates
description: Frequency of updates and new content releases.
sources: Amazon Appstore, App Annie, Apple App Store, Google Play Store, official app websites

name: Revenue Generation
description: The total revenue generated by the app through in-app purchases and ads.
sources: App Annie, Priori Data, Sensor Tower

name: Update Frequency
description: The frequency at which the app is updated with new features and bug fixes.
sources: Amazon Appstore, App Annie, Apple App Store, Google Play Store

name: User Engagement
description: The average time users spend on the app per day.
sources: App Annie, Apple App Store, Google Play Store, Sensor Tower, SimilarWeb

name: User Ratings
description: The average rating given by users on app stores.
sources: Amazon Appstore, Apple App Store, Google Play Store
